meta.title: Woning Scam Checker — transparent rental fraud check

brand.name: Woning Scam Checker
brand.tagline: Rules you can follow. No hidden scoring.

trust.line: No account · Rules plus optional AI layer (with API key) · Your text stays yours

hero.title: Check a listing before you pay
hero.subtitle: Paste text or a link to a property listing. You get a risk score with clear reasons — not a black box.

form.label: Listing text or URL
form.placeholder: Paste the full ad, or only a link such as 123wonen.nl/…
form.hint: Supported: public listing pages over HTTP. No login required.

result.marketDiff: Your price differs by {pct}% from that benchmark.
result.marketNoPrice: No price in the text to compare.

errors.generic: Analysis failed. Check that the API is reachable.

footer.note: Support tool using rules and optionally a language model (OpenAI-compatible API); it does not replace your own judgment or legal advice.
